items.title: Exclusive Buyer Representation
items.description: I work only with buyers — so you never compete against my own listings.

items.title: Neighborhood Expertise
items.description: Deep knowledge of Chatham, Summit, and surrounding communities — schools, commute times, and hidden gems.

items.title: Negotiation Strategy
items.description: Data-driven offers and creative deal structures that win in competitive markets.

data.title: Find Your Dream Home
data.subtitle: Tell me what you're looking for and I'll find it.

data.bio: Priya is dedicated exclusively to buyer representation, ensuring her clients never compete against her own listings. She has helped over 150 families find their perfect home in Chatham, Summit, and surrounding communities.
